name: Permanent disability from job accident in Centerville, what benefits?
description: Impairment % x wages x weeks + medical.[1]

mainEntity.name: Permanent disability from job accident in Centerville, what benefits?

acceptedAnswer.text: Impairment % x wages x weeks + medical.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah permanent partial disability pays 66 2/3% wages x impairment rating (0-100%) x weeks; total disability lifetime. Medical lifelong.[1] Key factors: MMI certification, AMA guides rating, retraining. Dispute low ratings, negotiate lump sum; plan finances. Ratings drive value.
